arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the S3 bucket.

bucket_domain_name.description: The domain name of the S3 bucket.

bucket_regional_domain_name.description: The regional domain name of the S3 bucket.

hosted_zone_id.description: The Route 53 Hosted Zone ID for the S3 bucket's region.

id.description: The name of the S3 bucket.

region.description: The AWS region where the S3 bucket is located.

website_domain.description: The domain name of the S3 bucket's website endpoint.

website_endpoint.description: The endpoint of the S3 bucket when configured as a website.
